chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Revision No.S- 13 of 2002 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Applications in d/o case For hearing of CMA 621/2019 (Restoration) 07-10-2022 Mr. Sikandar Ali Junejo, Advocate for the applicants. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General. ***** By means of listed application, the applicants seek recalling of order dated 29.05.2019 and restoring of the case on its original position on the ground that on the alleged date when the matter was dismissed for non-prosecution, attorney of the applicants could not make his appearance due to Ramzan and learned counsel for the applicants also failed to make his appearance on account of his illness. Listed application was filed within time and notices thereof were issued to the private respondents, so much so, publication was effected, but no one had turned up from the private respondents’ side to contest the instant restoration application. Considering the fact that the listed application is within time and the ground of illness of learned counsel for the applicants has been taken specifically in the application for his non-appearance, instant application (CMA-621 of 2019) is allowed by recalling the order dated 29.05.2019. Consequently, the instant Civil R.A is restored on the same position as it was on the aforesaid date; however, subject to costs of Rs.5,000/-(Five Thousand) to be deposited by the applicants in the High Court Bar Library Fund within 30-days hereof. Let notices be issued to the private respondents for 14.11.2022. JUDGE Ahmad
